LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MALCOLM FONG, AND, MICHAEL ZHANG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO FALSE ARREST, FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, NO OPPOSITION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED AS TO REMAINING ISSUES. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED WHETHER THE USE OF FORCE WAS REASONABLE. (HENRION DEPOSITION 40:14-18, 43:13-44:12).THE COURT'S RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANTS BRINGING A NEW MOTION TO ADDRESS ISSUES THE COURT HAS NOT PREVIOUSLY ADDRESSED. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MALCOLM FONG, and, MICHAEL ZHANG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Steven R. Jacobsen, Esq. Attorney at Law, (510) 465-1500 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; James F. Hannawalt, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3913 appearing for Defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment denied. Motion for summary adjudication granted as to false arrest, first cause of action, no opposition. Motion for summary adjudication denied as to remaining issues. Triable issue of fact raised whether the use of force was reasonable. (Henrion deposition 40:14-18, 43:13-44:12).The Court's ruling is without prejudice to Defendants bringing a new motion to address issues the Court has not previously addressed. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
